testcase.classname: Users Service getAllUsers should return from cache if available

testcase.classname: Users Service getAllUsers should fetch from DB and cache if no cache

testcase.classname: Users Service getAllUsers should fallback to DB if Redis error
testcase.name: Users Service getAllUsers should fallback to DB if Redis error

testcase.classname: Users Service deleteUser should delete user and invalidate cache

testcase.classname: User Routes GET /api/users should return users from cache
testcase.name: User Routes GET /api/users should return users from cache

testcase.classname: User Routes GET /api/users should return 500 on error

testcase.classname: User Routes DELETE /api/users/:id should delete user
